reasons: Recipient is a verified TNG merchant with full KYC
SSM-registered business with long-standing trading history
No fraud reports filed against this recipient in the last 90 days
Customer has prior payment history with this merchant
known-good.recommendation: Auto-approve. Recipient is a verified merchant or registered utility/government body with strong trust signals across all checks.

reasons: Recipient is not a verified TNG merchant or SSM-registered business
Recipient account opened recently and has limited history
Network reputation score is moderate but not strongly positive
Transaction amount is above customer's 30-day average
grey-zone.recommendation: Hold for guardian review. Risk is not critical but signals are mixed — let the guardian approve, decline, or call the customer to clarify before releasing funds.

reasons: Recipient is on TNG, Bank Negara, NSRC, and CCID fraud blacklists
Multiple fraud reports filed against this recipient in the last 30 days
Recipient flagged as a known mule account in active investigation
Recipient name matches SC investor alert for illegal scheme
known-bad.recommendation: Block immediately. Do not release funds under any circumstances. Notify both customer and guardian, and escalate to the fraud team. Encourage customer to report via NSRC 997.
